calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Aug-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Brenda Fields
Appearances:
Bryan J. McCormack, Esq. for Plaintiff Barbara Wright, the guardian ad litem and Teresa Faison, a minor also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
The balance of the settlement proceeds of $10,397.80 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank Of Americal, 3250 Mission St, San Francisco
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.
